user_prompt: А теперь убери разбивку по городам и покажи по тарифам.

history: Покажи конверсию в завершенные поездки по городам за последнюю неделю.

expected_sql_logic: Must NOT contain city. Must group by tariff_type. Must keep completion_rate and the last-week date window.
reference_sql: SELECT t.tariff_type AS tariff_type, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 4) AS completion_rate FROM rides r JOIN tariffs t ON t.id = r.tariff_id WHERE date(r.created_at) >= '2026-04-17' AND date(r.created_at) <= '2026-04-24' GROUP BY t.tariff_type ORDER BY t.tariff_type

user_prompt: Теперь только завершённые поездки и покажи среднюю длительность по городам.

history: Покажи конверсию в завершенные поездки по городам за последнюю неделю.
А теперь убери разбивку по городам и покажи по тарифам.

expected_sql_logic: Must keep the last-week date window. Must group by city. Must filter only completed rides. Must compute avg_ride_duration.
reference_sql: SELECT u.city AS city, ROUND(AVG(r.duration_minutes), 4) AS avg_ride_duration FROM rides r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE date(r.created_at) >= '2026-04-17' AND date(r.created_at) <= '2026-04-24' AND r.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.city ORDER BY u.city

history: Покажи конверсию в завершенные поездки по городам за последнюю неделю.

expected_sql_logic: Must keep the city grouping and add a Moscow filter. Must keep completion_rate and the last-week date window.
reference_sql: SELECT u.city AS city, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 4) AS completion_rate FROM rides r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE date(r.created_at) >= '2026-04-17' AND date(r.created_at) <= '2026-04-24' AND u.city = 'Moscow' GROUP BY u.city ORDER BY u.city
